overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk along a wooden ocean pier. The player moves from the entrance tower through a narrow building-lined corridor onto the open pier, then pans to view the coastline and sailboat before turning back toward the pier end.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier entrance with tower and benches

agents.ego_description: walking forward along the wooden pier entrance past black benches and white railings

entered.detail: white tower with red tile roof and pointed spire
ornate black metal bench on wooden deck
white painted wooden railing along pier edge
overhead cables stretching along the pier

segments.scene_description: The video begins at the entrance of a wooden ocean pier. A distinctive white tower with a red roof stands on the left, while black metal benches and white railings line the walkway. The camera moves steadily forward along the wooden planks under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor between small pier buildings

events.description: entering the narrow corridor section between small buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage between the pier shops and buildings

entered.detail: small wooden buildings with blue trim and lattice windows
small wooden buildings with blue trim and decorative windows
green ivy growing on white brick walls

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow corridor flanked by small wooden pier shops with blue trim and lattice windows. Ivy-covered walls line the sides as the camera continues walking forward, moving away from the entrance tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pier walkway with ocean views and benches

events.description: exiting the building corridor into the open pier with ocean visible on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking along the open pier deck with green benches and white railings on both sides, approaching the pier end

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water extending to horizon
calm blue ocean water extending to horizon
green painted wooden benches with white frames
green painted wooden benches with white frames
two-story building at the end of the pier with dark roof

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow corridor, the scene opens onto the wide pier deck with unobstructed ocean views on both sides. Green benches and white railings line the wooden walkway as the camera advances toward the two-story building at the pier's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal overlook with view of beach and shoreline

events.description: camera turns sharply to the right to face the coastline and beach

agents.ego_description: stopping forward progress and turning to observe the sailboat and coastline

notable_agents.action: white sailboat with single mast moving slowly on the water near the coastline

entered.detail: sandy beach curving along the shoreline with waves
modern beach houses and buildings along the coast
hazy mountains rising behind the coastline

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to reveal the coastline, showing a sandy beach with modern houses nestled against hazy mountains. A white sailboat drifts on the calm water near the shore while the ocean stretches out to the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier end approach with two-story building ahead

events.description: camera turns back to face forward along the pier toward the end structure

agents.ego_description: turning back to face the pier end building while observing the sailboat passing on the right

notable_agents.action: sailboat continuing to move past the pier on the right side, now further in the distance

entered.detail: two-story dark building with multiple windows at pier terminus

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back to face the end of the pier, where a two-story building with a dark roof awaits. The sailboat continues its journey on the right side, now moving further into the distance as the ocean stretches out on both sides of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the enclosed entrance of a wooden ocean pier out toward the expansive open sea. It begins by moving past a white tower with a red roof and black metal benches under an overcast sky, steadily advancing along the wooden planks. As the camera progresses, the environment narrows into a corridor flanked by ivy-covered walls and small wooden shops with blue trim before opening up onto a wide deck with unobstructed ocean views. The camera then pans right to reveal a sandy coastline with modern houses and hazy mountains, capturing a white sailboat drifting on the calm water. Finally, the view turns back toward the pier's end and a two-story building, while the sailboat recedes into the distance across the vast horizon.
